# List With Vertical Dividers

List With Vertical Dividers presents an unordered list (`<ul>`) or description list (`<dl>`)
as a simple, inline list of items, separated with vertical dividers.

List With Vertical Dividers is not a web component, but instead a CSS class(es) which you add onto the
native HTML `<ul>` or `<dl>` elements.
